text:
Hyper Puffball (マリモッチ, Marimocchi) is a card found in the Greed Island game. This is a standard card that can be obtained by the player. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 14, Chapter 137 These cards can be placed in the player's "Free Slots".
__NOTOC__

Summary

 trying to catch a Hyper Puffball]]

This is a common creature found in the Greed Island game. It is very difficult to catch once aware of your presence. This little creature is very very fast. It will continuously dart around until it can escape.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.673 :: マリモッチ 
超高速で移動するボール状の生き物。固さはゴムボール程度で攻撃されてもダメージはないが、顔面に直撃の体当りをくらうと、かなりムカツく。
|-
![Eng]
|No.673 :: Hyper Puffball 
A ball-shaped animal that moves very fast. Only as hard as a rubber ball, but a few smacks in the face are sure to put you in a bad mood.
|}
